args.subject: Summary of the client meeting
args.body:
Dear John,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to provide you with a summary of our recent client meeting held on May 5, 2024.

Meeting Overview:
- Discussed the client's requirements for the new project.
- Agreed on the project timeline and key milestones.
- Reviewed the initial design concepts and gathered client feedback.

Action Items:
- I will update the project plan based on your feedback.
- David will coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase.

Please note that the next meeting is scheduled for 2024-06-01.

Thank you for your time and valuable input. If you have any questions or require further information, feel free to reach out.

Best regards,
Emma Johnson
